notes: Includes BI tools, data warehousing; evolved into IBM Cognos and IBM SPSS product lines
Legacy data access, transformation; evolved into IBM DataStage and InfoSphere
VisualAge tools; IBM donated Eclipse to open source 2001; succeeded by Rational and Eclipse
CICS still active on z/OS; MQSeries -> IBM MQ still active; Encina deprecated
IBM framing network computing around Intranet deployment; became universal
Distributed object standard; IBM endorsed alongside Java Beans; replaced by Web Services/REST
Multi-tier architecture; evolved into SOA and microservices; conceptually still relevant
TME10 - 10th version; IBM Tivoli brand continues; evolved into IBM Cloud and AI Ops tools
Aberdeen explicitly cites electronic commerce as benefit; became one of largest economic sectors
